input_text:
Upgraded from pytest 7.2 to pytest 8.1. The main motivation was getting access to the improved diff output for failed assertions — 8.x gives much more readable failure messages.

Updated about a dozen deprecated fixture usages (the @pytest.fixture syntax for yield fixtures changed slightly). Ran the full test suite: 487 tests pass, 0 failures. No logic changes to any test or application code, pure tooling upgrade.
reviewer_notes: Pure tooling upgrade (pytest 7.2 → 8.1). No design or policy decisions.
